    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Alert
    Represents alerts associated to a maintenance
    AlertController
    Alert Controller
    AlertListResponseDto
    Dto used in the alerts menu to list all the alerts
    AlertRepository
    Alert Repository
    AlertResponseDto
    Dto containing the information of an alert
    AlertService
    Alert Service
    AuthController
    Auth Controller
    AuthEntryPointJwt
    Custom authentication error class
    AuthResponseDto
    DTO used to transmit the token
    AuthService
    Auth Service
    AuthTokenFilter
    The class that validates the token as auth overriding the original validation
    CostsController
    Costs Controller
    CostsService
    The service that contains the logic for the dashboards
    CostsSummaryDto
    Dto used to transmit information about the maintenance costs for the user dashboard
    CostsSummaryDto.CategoryCostDto
    A Dto that organizes costs by category with total spent and the percentage of the total spent
    CostsSummaryDto.VehicleCostDto
    A Dto that organizes costs by vehicle with the vehicle id and name, the total spent and the percentage of the total spent
    CreateMaintenanceRequestDto
    Dto representing a maintenance creating with information about the maintenance and the alert
    CustomUserDetailsService
    User Detail Service
    Equipment
    The model to represent the equipment a user owns for their diy projects
    Equipment.EquipmentCategory
    An enum containing all categories of the equipments
    GlobalExceptionHandler
    Class that allows to catch and treat exceptions and returns more detailed reasons for the exception as a response
    JwtUtil
    Token utility service class
    LoginRequestDto
    Dto with the information to log in a user
    Maintenance
    The maintenance associated to a vehicle
    Maintenance.MaintenanceType
    All the maintenances types
    MaintenanceController
    Maintenance Controller
    MaintenancePhoto
    The maintenance photos model
    MaintenanceRepository
    Maintenance Repository
    MaintenanceResponseDto
    Dto with the basic information of a maintenance
    MaintenanceService
    Maintenance Service
    MileageLog
    A record of logs for the different mileage changes
    MileageLogRepository
    Mileage logging repository
    OAuth2SuccessHandler
    Class to process OAuth
    PitlaneApplication
    Main class for the project
    RegisterRequestDto
    A Dto created to register the user
    UpdateVehicleDto
    Dto used to update a vehicle
    User
    User entity
    UserController
    User Controller
    UserRepository
    User Repository
    UserResponseDto
    Dto to represent the return of the user information
    Vehicle
    The vehicle a user owns
    VehicleController
    Vehicle Controller
    VehicleDetailResponseDTO
    Dto representing the vehicle info for the vehicle detail page
    VehicleRepository
    Vehicle Repository
    VehicleResponseDto
    The dto used for the dashboard vehicle info
    VehiclesService
    Vehicle Service
    WebSecurityConfig
    The configuration to the authentication and layered security
